stories.title: GPT-5.5 Codex reasoning-token clustering may be leading to degraded performance
stories.summary: OpenAI's GPT-5.5 Codex is exhibiting reasoning-token clustering behavior that may cause degraded performance in coding tasks, sparking widespread discussion on GitHub about the model's reliability.

stories.title: China's Z.ai GLM-5.2 Model Enters Competitive AI Race Against Anthropic and OpenAI
stories.summary: Z.ai's GLM-5.2 model demonstrates competitive capabilities comparable to leading frontier models from Anthropic and OpenAI, signaling China's accelerating progress and the success of its 'fast follower' approach in the global AI race.

stories.title: Better Models: Worse Tools
stories.summary: A provocative essay exploring how improvements in AI model capabilities can paradoxically lead to worse tool-use behavior, as models become more confident but less reliable at following structured tool protocols.

stories.title: Anthropic Discusses Custom AI Chip Partnership With Samsung
stories.summary: Anthropic is in early discussions with Samsung to develop a custom AI chip, joining OpenAI and others seeking to reduce reliance on Nvidia for inference hardware.

stories.title: Microsoft Launches $2.5 Billion Frontier Company for Enterprise AI Deployment
stories.summary: Microsoft announced Microsoft Frontier Company, backed by $2.5B and 6,000 engineers, to embed directly with enterprise clients designing, deploying, and scaling AI systems — following Amazon's similar $1B announcement.

stories.title: Elon Musk Reveals AI Device Prototype to SpaceX Investors
stories.summary: Elon Musk unveiled a new AI device prototype to SpaceX investors, signaling expansion into consumer AI hardware beyond aerospace and electric vehicles.

stories.title: New York Enacts First-of-Its-Kind Law Requiring AI-Generated Ad Disclosures
stories.summary: New York became the first state requiring clear disclosure labels on ads featuring AI-generated synthetic performers, with fines up to $5,000 for repeat violations. SAG-AFTRA backed the transparency measure.

stories.title: $85,000 in tokens later: What I learned from scaling agentic coding at Lovable
stories.summary: Lovable shares hard-won lessons from spending $85K on LLM tokens while scaling agentic coding workflows, offering practical insights on cost management and agent reliability.

stories.title: MIT: What is agentic AI today, and what do we want it to be?
stories.summary: MIT computer scientist Phillip Isola cuts through the hype around agentic AI to explain how AI agents actually work, their current limitations, and what the future might hold for this rapidly advancing technology.

stories.title: Mapping with In-Memory Layers to Reduce LLM Overload
stories.summary: A technical deep-dive into using in-memory mapping layers to reduce computational overload in LLM-based applications, improving response latency for spatial and compositional queries.
